title: PipeSync dbg122: legacy Users modal removed, pill buttons
description:
The old Users & companies admin modal and its inline permission/settings forms are fully removed from PipeSync. User approvals and module access now rely on the dedicated admin flows added in recent dbg batches (no legacy Settings modal).

Who is affected: OVH private server on deploy. SaaS when Mike applies the platform version in releases.html.
changeLog: Remove legacy Users admin modal type and render paths from app.js and psr-admin-modals.js.
Trim users-admin.js to companies-only rendering; drop pending-review and permission draft UI tied to the old modal.
Cache bust dbg122 on portal runtime, PipeSync, mobile, and addon manifest.
Unified pill button theme on PipeSync desktop and client portal (hp-btn tokens + control styling).
